summary: Case1 heritage-district X-indicator workflow memory: load AOI, function-source, OSM/cache, and street-view resources from case memory before computing indicators.
workflow_steps: Build dataset cards and grounding policy from declared resources.
Discover AOI, OSM/cache, function-source, and street-view paths from memory and prompt payload.
Run source extent diagnostics before indicator computation.
Classify indicators as direct, proxy-only, or unsupported.
Export metric CSV/GPKG/chart artifacts and include correction hooks.
Store reviewer feedback as experience memory for the next run.
guardrails: Do not jump to Y modeling in this case; only construct and audit X indicators.
Report proxy-only status for function-source and street-view-derived indicators.
If road/building layers are AOI-clipped or mismatched, queue an OSM/context refetch rather than silently accepting them.
